title: Delhi High Court protects IndiGo from coercive action over ₹458 crore GST demand
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday protected InterGlobe Aviation, the owner of IndiGo Airlines, from coercive action in connection with a Goods and Services Tax (GST) demand of around ₹458 crore [Interglobe Aviation Vs Additional Commissioner CGST].A Division Bench of Justices Nitin Wasudeo Sambre and Ajay Digpaul passed the interim order after observing that, prima facie, the amount received by IndiGo appeared to be 'compensation' and could not be termed as 'supply'.Justice Nitin Wasudeo Sambre and
